title: OpenPRD Product Requirements Document
description: The front-matter manifest of an OpenPRD document. OpenPRD is a deliberately lightweight, single-file PRD standard: one prd/<slug>/prd.md per product decision, authored by a human or an AI agent. The document body is Markdown with a fixed set of sections; this schema governs only the YAML front-matter. PRD documents are private by convention (gitignored) — only the OpenPRD standard itself is published.

openprd.description: OpenPRD standard version this document conforms to, e.g. '0.1'.

id.description: Kebab-case slug, unique within the repo. Also the directory name: prd/<id>/prd.md.

owner.description: Optional DID or handle of the accountable owner, e.g. a LogicSRC agent or account DID.

repo.description: Optional owner/name of the repository this PRD targets.

created.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the PRD was created.

updated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last substantive edit.

tags.description: Optional freeform labels for grouping PRDs.

supersedes.description: Optional ids of earlier PRDs this one replaces.
